title: DarkTitleBarForge
description: A mod to add dark mode support to the game window's title bar on Windows 10 version 1809 and above.
body: This mod is an unofficial remake of the [DarkTitleBar](https://modrinth.com/mod/darktitlebar) mod for Forge 1.20.1, 1.20.2, and 1.20.4 versions. It has been open-sourced on GitHub. The mod adds a dark title bar to Minecraft on Windows 10 version 1809 and above.
